requirement_topic.en: CNEE / Distributor Grid Connection — Anti-Islanding, IEC 61727 Interface, and 60 Hz / 120-240 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: CNEE / 配电商并网——防孤岛、IEC 61727接口及60 Hz / 120-240 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: CNEE / 配電商併網——防孤島、IEC 61727介面及60 Hz / 120-240 V參數

summary.en: Guatemala grid-tied PV inverters are reviewed in the context of CNEE technical norms, distributor interconnection practice, and project-owner requirements. For distributed renewable generation and self-consumption with exported surplus, the installer or project owner should confirm CNEE's current Generación Distribuida Renovable rules and the applicable distributor conditions before connection. Practical inverter evidence normally centers on IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface behavior, and protection settings suitable for Guatemala's 60 Hz, 120/240 V low-voltage service. Larger projects may also need AMM or transmission/distribution operator review. Factory settings validated for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid should not be used as Guatemala settings without reconfiguration and project-specific validation.
summary.zh: 危地马拉并网光伏逆变器通常在CNEE技术规范、配电商并网实践和项目业主要求的框架下审查。对于分布式可再生发电及带余电上网的自用项目，安装方或项目业主应在接入前确认CNEE现行Generación Distribuida Renovable规则和适用配电商条件。实际逆变器证据通常集中于IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口行为，以及适合危地马拉60 Hz、120/240 V低压供电的保护整定。较大型项目还可能需要AMM或输配电运营方审查。按中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网验证的出厂设置，不应在未重新配置和项目验证的情况下作为危地马拉设置使用。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉併網光伏逆變器通常在CNEE技術規範、配電商併網實務和項目業主要求的框架下審查。對於分散式可再生發電及帶餘電上網的自用項目，安裝方或項目業主應在接入前確認CNEE現行Generación Distribuida Renovable規則和適用配電商條件。實際逆變器證據通常集中於IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面行為，以及適合瓜地馬拉60 Hz、120/240 V低壓供電的保護整定。較大型項目還可能需要AMM或輸配電運營方審查。按中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網驗證的出廠設置，不應在未重新配置和項目驗證的情況下作為瓜地馬拉設置使用。

standards_or_laws: CNEE — Norma Técnica para la Conexión, Operación, Control y Comercialización de la Generación Distribuida Renovable and current distributed renewable generation guidance
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Guatemala low-voltage grid context — 60 Hz, 120/240 V service; distributor-specific voltage and protection settings must be confirmed

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or protection test results. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz grid and standard 220/380 V low-voltage supply. They do not establish compliance with Guatemala CNEE or distributor interconnection requirements and do not prove that the inverter's protection thresholds, anti-islanding behavior, reconnection delays, or voltage ride-through settings are appropriate for a 60 Hz, 120/240 V grid.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏电站并网技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408逆变器技术要求，以及国内防孤岛或保护测试结果。这些文件面向中国50 Hz电网和220/380 V低压供电条件，不能证明符合危地马拉CNEE或配电商并网要求，也不能证明逆变器保护阈值、防孤岛行为、重连延迟或电压穿越设置适用于60 Hz、120/240 V电网。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏電站併網技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408逆變器技術要求，以及國內防孤島或保護測試結果。這些文件面向中國50 Hz電網和220/380 V低壓供電條件，不能證明符合瓜地馬拉CNEE或配電商併網要求，也不能證明逆變器保護閾值、防孤島行為、重連延遲或電壓穿越設置適用於60 Hz、120/240 V電網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid documents do not satisfy Guatemala CNEE, distributor, or AMM project gates by themselves. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Guatemala-specific protection settings table, and commissioning documentation showing 60 Hz / 120-240 V configuration. Confirm whether the project is distributed renewable generation, self-consumption with surplus, a distributor-interconnected project, or an AMM wholesale-market project; the applicable approval path changes the documentary package.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件本身不满足危地马拉CNEE、配电商或AMM项目门槛。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、危地马拉专用保护整定表，以及显示60 Hz / 120-240 V配置的调试文件。须确认项目属于分布式可再生发电、带余电上网的自用、配电商接入项目，还是AMM批发市场项目；适用审批路径会改变文件包。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件本身不滿足瓜地馬拉CNEE、配電商或AMM項目門檻。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、瓜地馬拉專用保護整定表，以及顯示60 Hz / 120-240 V配置的調試文件。須確認項目屬於分散式可再生發電、帶餘電上網的自用、配電商接入項目，還是AMM批發市場項目；適用審批路徑會改變文件包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV connection: CNEE rules, distributor conditions, and where applicable AMM or operator requirements are project gates before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid review but does not transfer to Guatemala CNEE, distributor, or AMM acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Guatemala grid connection as a fresh CNEE and distributor or AMM review, not as an extension of China GB/T acceptance. Reconfigure and validate the inverter for Guatemala's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid, with IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence tied to the supplied model and firmware. Confirm the current CNEE rule, distributor settings, and any AMM requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将危地马拉并网视为新的CNEE及配电商或AMM审查，而不是中国GB/T认可的延伸。须针对危地马拉60 Hz / 120-240 V电网重新配置并验证逆变器，并提供与所供型号和固件对应的IEC 62116及IEC 61727证据。出货前应确认现行CNEE规则、配电商整定及任何AMM要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將瓜地馬拉併網視為新的CNEE及配電商或AMM審查，而不是中國GB/T認可的延伸。須針對瓜地馬拉60 Hz / 120-240 V電網重新配置並驗證逆變器，並提供與所供型號和韌體對應的IEC 62116及IEC 61727證據。出貨前應確認現行CNEE規則、配電商整定及任何AMM要求。

requirement_topic.en: Distributed Renewable Generation and Self-Consumption — CNEE, Distributor, and AMM Project Gates
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式可再生发电及自用——CNEE、配电商和AMM项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: 分散式可再生發電及自用——CNEE、配電商和AMM項目門檻

summary.en: Guatemala permits distributed renewable generation and self-consumption arrangements, but the inverter is only one part of the approval package. The project owner normally needs to follow CNEE technical rules, the relevant distributor's interconnection process, metering requirements, protection review, and commissioning checks. Projects participating in the wholesale market or connected at higher voltage may involve AMM, INDE, distributor, or transmission-operator requirements. Chinese inverter documentation should therefore be packaged around the Guatemala project route, not only around product certification.
summary.zh: 危地马拉允许分布式可再生发电和自用安排，但逆变器只是审批文件包的一部分。项目业主通常需要遵守CNEE技术规则、相关配电商并网流程、计量要求、保护审查和调试检查。参与批发市场或高压接入的项目可能涉及AMM、INDE、配电商或输电运营方要求。因此，中国逆变器文件应围绕危地马拉项目路径组织，而不仅是产品认证。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉允許分散式可再生發電和自用安排，但逆變器只是審批文件包的一部分。項目業主通常需要遵守CNEE技術規則、相關配電商併網流程、計量要求、保護審查和調試檢查。參與批發市場或高壓接入的項目可能涉及AMM、INDE、配電商或輸電運營方要求。因此，中國逆變器文件應圍繞瓜地馬拉項目路徑組織，而不僅是產品認證。

standards_or_laws: CNEE — distributed renewable generation and self-consumption technical norms
Distributor interconnection and metering procedures — EEGSA, Energuate, or other applicable distributor
AMM market and operating requirements where the project participates in the wholesale electricity market

summary.en: China distributed PV connection approvals are issued under Chinese energy policy, grid company rules, and domestic inverter standards. Those approvals may show that an inverter model has been used in Chinese distributed PV projects, but they do not address Guatemala's CNEE procedure, distributor metering and protection review, AMM rules, or the 60 Hz grid configuration.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏并网审批依据中国能源政策、电网公司规则和国内逆变器标准作出。此类审批可表明某逆变器型号曾用于中国分布式光伏项目，但不覆盖危地马拉CNEE程序、配电商计量和保护审查、AMM规则或60 Hz电网配置。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏併網審批依據中國能源政策、電網公司規則和國內逆變器標準作出。此類審批可表明某逆變器型號曾用於中國分散式光伏項目，但不覆蓋瓜地馬拉CNEE程序、配電商計量和保護審查、AMM規則或60 Hz電網配置。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: A China domestic distributed PV approval does not transfer to Guatemala. The importer or EPC should map the project to the correct Guatemala route, obtain distributor or AMM feedback on inverter settings and documentation, and provide Spanish or bilingual technical files where required. Model certificates should be supplemented by project commissioning records, settings files, and evidence that the inverter is configured for Guatemala's 60 Hz network.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内分布式光伏审批不能转移至危地马拉。进口商或EPC应将项目映射到正确的危地马拉路径，就逆变器整定和文件向配电商或AMM取得反馈，并在需要时提供西班牙语或双语技术文件。型号证书应补充项目调试记录、整定文件，以及证明逆变器已按危地马拉60 Hz电网配置的证据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內分散式光伏審批不能轉移至瓜地馬拉。進口商或EPC應將項目映射到正確的瓜地馬拉路徑，就逆變器整定和文件向配電商或AMM取得反饋，並在需要時提供西班牙語或雙語技術文件。型號證書應補充項目調試記錄、整定文件，以及證明逆變器已按瓜地馬拉60 Hz電網配置的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as a project approval path where a PV system exports to the distribution grid, participates in self-consumption with surplus, or enters the wholesale market
mandatory_status.cn: China distributed PV approvals are local project approvals and are not market-access approvals for Guatemala

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Before committing a Chinese inverter to a Guatemala distributed PV or self-consumption project, identify the CNEE, distributor, and possible AMM route and ask for the exact documentation and settings expected. China project approvals and GB/T certificates are useful background only; they do not replace Guatemala interconnection review or 60 Hz commissioning evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在将中国逆变器用于危地马拉分布式光伏或自用项目前，应识别CNEE、配电商及可能的AMM路径，并确认所需具体文件和整定。中国项目审批和GB/T证书仅可作为背景材料，不能替代危地马拉并网审查或60 Hz调试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在將中國逆變器用於瓜地馬拉分散式光伏或自用項目前，應識別CNEE、配電商及可能的AMM路徑，並確認所需具體文件和整定。中國項目審批和GB/T證書僅可作為背景材料，不能替代瓜地馬拉併網審查或60 Hz調試證據。
